title: Zoning
description: First steps in the suburban world. The party processes the lawns.

steps.text: The portal's afterimage faded. The grass was mowed. All of it. Simultaneously.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The ambient mana here is... carbonated?

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: Every house is the same house. Tactically, that's either useless or brilliant.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: There's a small shrine on each lawn. Plastic. A bird bath, I think. Nobody prays at it, but everybody trims around it.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Stay close. The mailboxes are numbered. That means someone is COUNTING.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: I already love it here and I refuse to apologize.
